infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is used to scan asset QR codes and capture maintenance photos and videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access is used to record voice notes and video with audio.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library access lets you attach existing photos to work orders.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location access is used to record your position when you check in or check out.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow photo library access to attach images to work orders.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow camera access to capture photos and videos for work orders.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow microphone access to record voice notes for work orders.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow camera access to scan asset QR codes and capture maintenance media.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow microphone access to record video with audio.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow location access to record your position when you check in or check out.
